title: A Survey of Context Engineering for Large Language Models
abstract: The paper presents Context Engineering as a disciplined approach to optimizing information inputs for LLMs beyond basic prompt design. The authors analyzed over 1,400 research papers to establish a comprehensive taxonomy. Foundational components include retrieval, generation, processing, and management mechanisms. System implementations examined include RAG, Memory Systems, and Multi-Agent Systems.
key_insights: Comprehensive taxonomy of context engineering across 1400+ papers
Three-tier memory architecture: short-term (exact text), mid-term (summaries), long-term (embeddings)
RAG systems enhance responses by integrating external information sources
Context collapse: enlarged windows cause models to fail distinguishing contexts
Recurrent compression buffers: compress earlier stream parts into smaller representations
Critical gap: models excel at comprehending contexts but struggle generating long-form outputs

applications.title: Implement Three-Tier Memory Architecture
applications.description: Add mid-term memory layer (summaries) between short-term (exact text) and long-term (embeddings) for better context retrieval
applications.technical_approach: Add new memory tier with automatic summarization, implement retrieval strategy across all three tiers

applications.title: Context Collapse Prevention
applications.description: Implement mechanisms to prevent information erosion during COT iterations
applications.impact: High - Maintains quality in long conversations
applications.technical_approach: Track context degradation metrics, implement context refresh strategies, preserve critical information

applications.title: Recurrent Compression Buffers
applications.description: Compress older context stream parts into smaller representations without losing critical information
applications.impact: Very High - Scales to much larger contexts
applications.technical_approach: Implement streaming compression, maintain buffer states, integrate with existing RAG pipeline

review_status.summary: Exceptional survey paper - foundational for our context engineering architecture. Provides comprehensive taxonomy and clear implementation pathways.
review_status.recommended_action: Deep review required. Priority implementation: three-tier memory architecture.

implementation_status.notes: Awaiting deep review and planning session
